error_signature: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON parameter due to extra quotes
symptom: The workflow fails with an error indicating that the JSON parameter is not valid. This occurs when extra quotes are added to a JSON string.
applies_when: Passing the output as a parameter
not_this_if: No quotes are added to the JSON string
root_cause: The error occurs because the output of JSON.stringify is already a valid JSON string, and adding additional quotes results in an invalid JSON format that cannot be parsed correctly.
fix_steps: Locate the node where JSON.stringify is used
Remove any additional quotes surrounding the output
Test the workflow again to ensure it executes without errors
agent_instruction: Remove the extra quotes from the JSON.stringify output and re-test the workflow.
